_description: Example / schema file for state/memory-citations.json (real file is gitignored — operator-specific). Copy to state/memory-citations.json when first initializing, or let commander create it lazily on first citation.

_schema.key_format: <file>#<quote> — e.g. "learnings-CLI.md#\"npm install strips peer markers\"". File part is relative to the memory dir ($HYDRA_EXTERNAL_MEMORY_DIR or ./memory/). Quote may be wrapped in straight double quotes.

entry.count: integer — total number of times this entry has been cited across all tickets
entry.last_cited: YYYY-MM-DD — date of the most recent citation
entry.tickets: array of ticket refs that cited this entry (de-duplicated)
entry.promotion_threshold_reached: boolean — set by commander when count >= 3 AND tickets.length >= 3 distinct
entry.source: optional string — one of 'operator' (legacy, direct-drive chat answer) or 'supervisor' (Phase 2 agent-only interface; set when the MCP upstream supervisor answered supervisor.resolve_question). Absent = legacy 'operator' default.

<file>#<quote>.count_delta: integer — how many MEMORY_CITED lines for this key appeared in one report (usually 1)
<file>#<quote>.tickets_added: array of ticket refs to add (usually [current_ticket] or [])

delta_schema.merge_semantics: Commander merges delta into state/memory-citations.json by: (1) count += count_delta, (2) tickets = unique(tickets ++ tickets_added), (3) last_cited = today, (4) promotion_threshold_reached = (count >= 3 && distinct(tickets) >= 3)
